name: executor-file-site
description: executorfile.com: the site for Executor File, an encrypted register your executor can open with two standard tools.

scripts.dev: npm run fetch && npm run og && astro dev
scripts.build: npm run fetch && npm run og && astro build && node scripts/external-links.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run check:links && npm run check:voice && npm run check:recover && npm run check:jsonld && npm run check:llms
